job_description:
# Data Analyst
Company: Growth Ortho
Source: Indeed
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.indeed.com/viewjob?jk=2b0a4679bdd250ba

## Highlights
- Remote full-time data analyst role.
- Focuses on T-SQL, Power BI, data modeling, ETL understanding, dashboard development, root-cause analysis, data governance, and data quality initiatives.
- Cross-domain role with strong SQL/reporting overlap and solid functional fit under the new all-domain search rule.
strengths: Good overlap with SQL, Power BI, data modeling, ETL concepts, and data quality support.
Resume supports root-cause analysis, dashboards, reporting, and cross-functional business communication.
Remote Indeed role not previously tracked.
gaps: Finance department context is different from the current resume's domain strengths.
Role appears more BI/reporting focused than strict ETL validation.
notes: Good all-domain miss. Tailor toward SQL, reporting accuracy, Power BI, data quality, and stakeholder-facing analytics. Avoid inventing finance-domain experience.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Data Analyst | SQL | Power BI | Data Quality & Reporting

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.
replacements.replace: Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across multiple business domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Strong fit for remote analyst roles that require dashboarding, reporting accuracy, root-cause analysis, and business-friendly communication.

replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)
replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query), self-service reporting support
